s3.bucket.abortincompletemultipartupload: Specifies the days since the initiation of an incomplete multipart upload that Amazon S3 will wait before permanently removing all parts of the upload. For more information, see [ Stopping Incomplete Multipart Uploads Using a Bucket Lifecycle Policy](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/mpuoverview.html

s3.bucket.abortincompletemultipartupload.Description: Specifies the number of days after which Amazon S3 stops an incomplete multipart upload.
